proof_policy.readback_is: read-only archive of selected lane-month branches whose exact exit request is after contract expiration
proof_policy.readback_is_not: production proof, true P&L, scanner policy, contract-selection policy, broker action, DB mutation, sizing, or stop policy
proof_policy.trusted_proof_standard: future proof still requires trusted intraday exact-contract OPRA/NBBO bid/ask rows with executable entry/exit/fill P&L
